summary: All 4 findings from auditor v1 have been correctly fixed by coder v5. GoalCall clone copies all 6 runtime-relevant properties (Event correctly excluded). Step.Clone modifier pattern now mirrors parent. Cache ShallowClone prevents mutation of cached entry. GroupModifiers adds an actionable DroppedLeadingModifier warning. No new cross-file issues introduced by the fixes. 2150/2151 tests pass (1 pre-existing unrelated failure). Branch is clean.

previous_reviews_assessed.codeanalyzer: agree — v2 re-review verified all 4 fixes correctly and completely. Their property-by-property GoalCall audit was thorough.
previous_reviews_assessed.tester: agree — v4 PASS stands. The DoesNotMutateOriginalParameters test (line 358) validates the GoalCall clone fix. No new test gaps from the v5 changes.
previous_reviews_assessed.security: agree — their medium finding (F1, GoalCall race) is fully resolved by the clone fix. The 3 lows (negative Ms, unbounded retry, non-thread-safe stack) remain as accepted hardening backlog — all latent/user-sovereign.
